Features.introTitle: How our platform contributes to 10 sustainable development goals
Features.introText1: According to Article 9(4) of Regulation (EU) 2021/1060, projects from ERDF and JTF should be supported that are in line with the United Nations' goals for sustainable development and the Paris Agreement, as well as taking into account the principle of "avoiding significant harm".
Features.introText2: The United Nations have agreed on 17 goals for sustainable development (Sustainable Development Goals - SDGs) that are to be implemented by 2030. The goals are aimed at an equally ecologically, economically and socially sustainable development.
Features.title: POWERFUL FEATURES
Features.subtitle: Everything you need to transform your architectural visions into stunning visualizations
Features.healthDesc: The use of the platform reduces stress caused by long rendering times and working with local rendering. The accelerated rendering processes contribute to a better work-life balance, as architects can visualize their designs faster and reduce workload. Additionally, the project offers the possibility to develop projects more efficiently and with higher precision, contributing to better quality of construction projects and healthy, sustainable urban development.
Features.educationDesc: The project enables educational institutions to teach students digital visualization techniques and AI design. This prepares the next generation for the requirements of the architecture industry.
Features.equalityDesc: The project commits to discrimination-free development and use of its technology. Our initiative promotes equal opportunities by providing an accessible, intuitive platform for architects and planners regardless of gender, ethnic origin, religion, worldview, disability, age, or sexual orientation.
Features.cleanEnergyDesc: The project uses GPU-powered cloud rendering, which, despite higher energy consumption, is significantly more efficient in practice than traditional CPU rendering. Rendering times are reduced from hours or even days to just a few seconds, significantly reducing overall energy consumption. This technology not only optimizes energy consumption compared to conventional methods but also enables fast and resource-efficient use of modern visualization technologies.
Features.decentWorkDesc: By automating visualization processes, the project supports architects, urban planners, and creative professionals in increasing their productivity. This creates space for more creative and valuable tasks and promotes long-term sustainable economic growth. It contributes to the digital transformation of the architecture industry and creates new jobs in the field of AI and architecture, contributing to the promotion of a broad, inclusive economy.
Features.industryInfrastructureDesc: The project promotes digitization and innovation in the architecture industry by providing a cloud-based, GPU-supported platform for AI visualizations. This technology is not only relevant for architecture but can also be applied to other industries, such as urban planning or real estate. It promotes the development of resilient infrastructure and supports the creation of sustainable and future-proof innovation processes.
Features.inequalityDesc: The project contributes to reducing inequalities by opening access to advanced visualization technologies for small and medium-sized enterprises and freelancers. They benefit from the cost-effective, cloud-based solution that does not require expensive hardware. Smaller architecture firms can thus remain competitive and use the same innovative technologies as large companies.
Features.citiesMunicipalitiesDesc: The cloud-based solution reduces material consumption and enables environmentally friendly visualization of projects. This contributes to more sustainable production methods and minimizes energy consumption compared to traditional rendering processes.
Features.climateProtectionDesc: By optimizing rendering processes and reducing energy consumption, the project actively contributes to climate protection. The efficient use of cloud resources and the minimization of material consumption support sustainable practices and help reduce the ecological footprint of architectural visualization.

Footer.coFinancing: The project aims to develop central new features for the cloud-based AI visualization platform. This includes location-specific integration of 3D models into real environments, further processing of complete models, direct BIM integration, and AI-supported texture processing. The automated conversion of 3D models into photorealistic renderings is promoted and allows intuitive editing directly in the browser. The prototype significantly improves the visualization process. For architects, this creates a new tool that enables efficient, flexible, and realistic visualizations in early design phases – including precise adjustments and location-accurate representation.

subtitles: Transform your CAD files and sketches into photorealistic renders.
What ChatGPT is for text is typus.ai for architecture visualization. Sketch in, presentation picture out — in minutes.
An external visualization costs USD 500–1500. With typus.ai you create hundreds of variants per month — from USD 117.

problem.subtitle: The reality in the industry – typical market prices:
problem.conclusion: And every image is billed individually.
problem.statusQuoHeader: With Typus, you receive visualizations on a subscription basis instead of per project. Instead of commissioning each image individually from an external source, you can create visualizations in-house. A dedicated visualization specialist will support and train you or your team member.
problem.meaning1Desc: Days or weeks until the first draft.
problem.meaning2Desc: Tedious feedback loops via external portals.
problem.finalConclusion: For many architecture firms, this is too expensive and inflexible.

solution.title: The Image Flat Rate for Architecture Visualizations
solution.subtitle: With Typus, you get visualizations by subscription instead of per project. Instead of paying for each image individually, you can request as many visualizations as you want. A personal visualization specialist creates the images for you.
solution.step1Desc: Sketches, mockups or 3D models - send us what you have.
solution.step2Title: we create the images with AI
solution.step2Desc: Your personal specialist takes over the work. Like an external team member
solution.step3Desc: In the shortest possible time you will receive convincing results. You receive feedback on the AI workflow

howItsPossible.title: How is this possible?
howItsPossible.p1: We do not work with classic rendering pipelines, which are often time-consuming and expensive. Instead, we use the latest possibilities of AI-supported visualization technology to present architecture precisely and atmospherically in the shortest possible time.
howItsPossible.p2: Our visualizations are not generated automatically, but are created by experienced visualizers - all with a background in architecture and architectural representation. In this way, we combine the speed of modern AI with the design understanding of architects.
howItsPossible.p4: High-quality architectural visualizations – faster, more flexible and significantly more efficient.

benefits.title: The image flat rate for architectural visualizations
benefits.subtitle: With Typus, you receive visualizations on a subscription basis instead of per project. Instead of commissioning each image individually from an external source, you can create visualizations in-house. A dedicated visualization specialist will support and train you or your team member.

DetailedComparison.title: Full Feature Breakdown
DetailedComparison.subtitle: Every capability compared side by side — with traditional rendering techniques

time.label: Time to first result
time.traditional: Hours to days – manual rendering workflow

iterations.label: Revisions & variations
iterations.traditional: Limited – each adjustment requires new rendering runs

learningCurve.label: Onboarding effort
learningCurve.typus: Low – simple interface, ready to start immediately
learningCurve.traditional: High – complex tools, months of training required

hardware.label: Required hardware
hardware.typus: None – runs in the cloud in any browser
hardware.traditional: High-performance GPU required – expensive specialized systems

updates.label: AI model updates
updates.typus: Automatic – newest models available within 24 hours
updates.traditional: Manual – frequent software updates and version maintenance

onboarding.label: Getting started
onboarding.typus: Immediate – open browser and get started

control.label: Creative control
control.typus: Full – AI-supported, you have the final say

hybrid.label: Hybrid workflow
hybrid.typus: Yes – seamlessly integrate AI with existing methods

DetailedComparison.footer: * Time and cost figures are approximate estimates based on common industry benchmarks. Actual results will vary by project scope and complexity.

IndustryFAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
IndustryFAQ.subtitle: Answers to the most important questions of architects.

faq1.question: Can typus.ai replace traditional rendering?
faq1.answer: For many stages of design, yes. It provides instant, high-quality visualizations at a fraction of the cost.

faq2.question: Does it work with structural plans?
faq2.answer: You can upload basic sketches or wireframes to instantly generate photorealistic structures.

faq3.question: Can I test different facade materials?
faq3.answer: Yes, easily switch between brick, concrete, wood, and glass to evaluate aesthetics.

faq4.question: Do I need technical knowledge?
faq4.answer: No, our interface is intuitive. It works perfectly alongside your existing architectural software.

faq5.question: What does typus.ai cost for architectural firms?
faq5.answer: We offer scalable plans for freelance architects to large firms. See our pricing page.

IndustryFAQ.subtitle: Answers to the most important questions of interior architects.

faq1.question: Can I visualize entire room concepts?
faq1.answer: Yes, from empty spaces to fully furnished and styled rooms in seconds.

faq2.question: Does it handle different lighting conditions?
faq2.answer: You can simulate natural daylight, warm ambient lighting, or precise spotlights.

faq3.question: Can I show clients different layout options?
faq3.answer: Easily generate multiple arrangements of furniture and decor for presentation.

faq4.question: Do I need technical knowledge?
faq4.answer: No, it's designed specifically for rapid ideation without complex 3D rendering skills.

faq5.question: What does typus.ai cost for interior studios?
faq5.answer: We offer individual and team plans suited for interior design workflows.

FAQ.title: Common Questions Answered
FAQ.subtitle: All the answers in one place

setupTime.question: How quickly can I get started?
setupTime.answer: Right away. No downloads, no complicated setup — simply create an account and you're in.

freeImages.question: What comes after the 10 free images?
freeImages.answer: Once your 10 complimentary images are used, pick a subscription plan that matches your workflow and carry on creating.

technicalKnowledge.question: Is any technical expertise needed?
technicalKnowledge.answer: None whatsoever. The platform is built to feel natural and approachable for any skill level.

cancellation.question: Can I cancel on a monthly basis?
cancellation.answer: Yes, you can cancel the Pro-One subscription monthly. We offer the annual subscription at a significantly reduced rate.

customModels.question: What exactly are Custom AI Models?
customModels.answer: Custom AI Models are fine-tuned to reflect your unique design style or project needs, delivering sharper and more relevant results.

dataSecurity.question: How is my data handled?
dataSecurity.answer: Your information stays fully protected. We uphold strict data policies and never use your files to train any shared models.

ownModels.question: Am I able to train my own models?
ownModels.answer: Yes, Pro and Enterprise subscribers can develop custom AI models based on their own architectural work and design library.

studentDiscount.question: Do students get a reduced price?
studentDiscount.answer: Yes, we have specially priced plans for students and teachers to help nurture tomorrow's architecture talent.

germanSupport.question: Can I get support in German?
germanSupport.answer: Absolutely — our team provides complete support in German as well as English for all queries.

fileFormats.question: What file types does the platform accept?
fileFormats.answer: We handle many different formats, from CAD drawings and hand sketches to standard image files like JPG and PNG.

BlogTestimonial.sectionTitle: Solo architect wins AMA Award. No team. Only AI.
BlogTestimonial.p1: Architect Lucy Lago (@lucylago_arch) has just clinched the prestigious AMA Awards in Madrid, demonstrating how the fusion of creativity and technology is redefining contemporary architecture.
BlogTestimonial.h2: A Cliff House Powered by AI
BlogTestimonial.p2: Central to her award-winning cliff house design—also featured on ArchDaily—is the use of advanced AI tools that are transforming architectural visualization, enabling a faster and more intuitive transition from concept to immersive visual experience. As she revealed on Illustrarch, she integrates @typus.ai into her workflow. This allowed her to create high-quality visuals for the project independently—without the need to hire external visualizers or dedicate excessive time and resources. By leveraging AI, she was able to significantly reduce costs while maintaining full creative control over the process.
BlogTestimonial.p3: This AI-powered platform, funded by the EU NRW program in our region, allows architectural ideas to materialize into atmospheric visuals within minutes. This rapid translation of sketches and concepts into photorealistic imagery is opening new doors for designers, students, and studios looking to elevate presentations, communicate ideas more effectively, and experiment with styles without the traditional time and cost constraints.
BlogTestimonial.h4: AI: A Key Differentiator in Architecture
BlogTestimonial.p4: AI-driven visualization is becoming a key differentiator in architectural practice. With EU-supported innovations, upcoming 3D cloud integration, and the inclusion of real material manufacturer products, the future of architectural rendering promises to be not only faster but also more collaborative, immersive, and expressive.
BlogTestimonial.p5: For architects, students, and enthusiasts alike, the message is clear: AI is changing the entire way firms operate.
BlogTestimonial.euCoFunded: Solo architect wins AMA Award. Without a team. Only with AI.
BlogTestimonial.reelDescription1: Watch how Lucy Lago clinches the AMA Awards with AI-powered designs. In this exclusive video, she shares insights into her vision and the use of Typus AI.
BlogTestimonial.reelDescription2: A look behind the scenes of the design process featured on Illustrarch. Learn how the synergy between architecture and AI creates new possibilities.

SiegristTestimonial.p1:
The images appear calm, precise, and atmospheric: carefully designed facades, harmonious lighting moods, and convincing spatial qualities. However, such competition visualizations no longer necessarily have to be created through external rendering studios with long coordination loops and high additional costs. They can be developed directly within the design process – with AI.

Modern AI tools enable architects to visualize ideas faster, test variants in real-time, and communicate design concepts convincingly. As a result, visualizations transform from a subsequent presentation medium into an active tool in the creative process. This saves time, reduces costs, and opens up new possibilities for developing and presenting architectural concepts.
SiegristTestimonial.p2: In open competitions, many firms work with limited time and tight budgets. At the same time, expectations for visualization and presentation are continuously rising. AI is fundamentally changing this dynamic. In the case of Saint-Aubin, this meant: no external visualization studios, significantly reduced costs, extremely fast iterations, and more focus on the actual architectural design. The images did not become more generic — but rather more precise, because they arose directly from the creative process itself.
SiegristTestimonial.h3: Designing atmospheres instead of just representing them
SiegristTestimonial.p3: Also in the Transformation du Centre Scolaire project in Venthône in Valais, Siegrist Architectes used AI to explore how minimalist timber architecture integrates into the alpine landscape. The central question was no longer just: 'What does the building look like?' But rather: 'How does this place feel?' This is becoming increasingly relevant, especially for offices in the DACH region. Because today, competitions are not decided by concepts alone, but by the ability to convincingly convey spatial identity and atmosphere.
SiegristTestimonial.h4: From design idea to competition visualization in minutes
SiegristTestimonial.p4: Many offices know the classic routine: atmospheric renderings often come late — expensive, externally produced, and under time pressure. Siegrist Architectes worked differently. They combined their process with AI-driven image generation using Typus.AI. Light, materiality, and landscape integration could thus be explored during the design phase itself. Especially in timber construction, this opened up new possibilities. Facades and outdoor spaces could be tested within seconds — a process that used to take days.
SiegristTestimonial.p5:
The actual change

Therefore, the exciting question is not: 'Can AI visualize architecture?' But rather: 'What happens to competitions when suddenly every office can produce images at a competition level?'

Perhaps this will create a fairer starting point for the first time — regardless of the size of an office or its rendering budget.

For Siegrist Architectes, AI meant one thing above all: more control over their own architectural expression. And that is exactly where the real revolution might lie.
SiegristTestimonial.euCoFunded: Siegrist Architectes: Redefining school architecture with AI and wood.
SiegristTestimonial.reelDescription1: Discover how Siegrist Architectes use AI to visualize sustainable school environments in Saint-Aubin. A deep dive into wooden architecture.
SiegristTestimonial.reelDescription2: The transformation of the Venthône School Center. Alpine minimalism visualized with AI for a perfect landscape integration.
